public_reputation: Known locally through day-to-day work as deputy master.
manner: Moves through conversation like someone who solves visible problems first and interprets meaning second. In Shelk, that reads as someone polished, socially alert, and attentive to harmony, status, and cultural presentation, and the habits of a deputy master still shape how they handle timing, silence, and attention.
daily_function: Performs the ongoing duties of deputy master in and around Fashion Artisans Collective, where the role has practical consequences even when nothing dramatic is happening.
current_agenda: Keep Fashion Artisans Collective workable through the obligations of deputy master while managing the immediate pressure of institutional scrutiny in Shelk.
hidden_pressure: Must hold local credibility together even when the causes of strain sit elsewhere. Around Fashion Artisans Collective, that usually means carrying institutional scrutiny, reputation risk, daily strain without letting the role of deputy master visibly slip.

adventure_hooks.summary: Letha Silkgate can offer grounded local knowledge once the party proves it is useful rather than merely curious.
Letha Silkgate needs help with a problem in Fashion Artisans Collective that larger systems have pushed down onto ordinary hands.

support_scope_notes: Promoted from a preexisting named interface into the unified full-content NPC architecture. Sparse unsupported fields remain intentionally restrained.
public_signal: Letha Silkgate carries the look of a practiced local operator whose authority is read through place, familiarity, and the reactions of others more than formal insignia.

encounter_context.usual_environment: Fashion Artisans Collective: the part of Fashion Artisans Collective where their work actually matters day to day
who_avoids_them: those who only appear when things break
